summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blogs4Blocks iteration 15 - Stripe Payment Integration, City Background System, and Payment Success Page. All 22 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: GET /api/payments/rate-card returns 200 - PASS
Rate card has 9 prices (3 sizes x 3 frequencies) - PASS
Rate card has 3 multipliers (standard, premium, top-tier) - PASS
Rate card price structure has ad_size, frequency, base_price - PASS
Rate card multiplier structure has placement, multiplier - PASS
Rate card price values correct ($100-$1920) - PASS
Rate card multiplier values correct (1x, 1.25x, 1.5x) - PASS
POST /api/payments/checkout creates Stripe session - PASS
Checkout with premium placement applies 1.25x multiplier - PASS
Checkout with top-tier placement applies 1.5x multiplier - PASS
Checkout rejects invalid ad_size with 400 - PASS
Checkout rejects invalid placement with 400 - PASS
Checkout rejects missing required fields with 422 - PASS
GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} returns status for new session - PASS
Payment status handles invalid session_id gracefully - PASS
GET /api/advertise/stats returns 200 - PASS
Advertise stats has all required fields - PASS
Advertise stats values reasonable (30+ posts, 25+ users) - PASS
GET /api/stats returns 200 - PASS
Homepage stats: 30 posts, 28 contributors, 16 countries - PASS
GET /api/posts/featured/list returns 200 - PASS
Featured posts list is not empty - PASS
Homepage shows Statue of Liberty city background - PASS
Homepage city label: 'Statue of Liberty — New York City, USA' - PASS
About page shows different city (Old Havana — Havana, Cuba) - PASS
Category page shows city background - PASS
Advertise page shows city background (Seattle Space Needle) - PASS
Navbar has Advertise link - PASS
Footer has 'Advertise With Us' link - PASS
Featured carousel shows on homepage (1/7) - PASS
Advertise page loads with title 'Reach Marketing Professionals Worldwide' - PASS
Advertise page shows audience stats (30 Posts, 28 Contributors, 5 Continents) - PASS
Rate card table shows all 9 prices ($100-$1,920) - PASS
Ad size selectors (Small/Medium/Large) exist and work - PASS
Frequency selectors (1 Run/4 Runs/8 Runs) exist and work - PASS
Placement selectors (Standard/Premium/Top Tier) exist and work - PASS
Price summary shows calculated total - PASS
Price calculation updates correctly (Large + 8 Runs + Top Tier = $2,880) - PASS
'Continue to Checkout' button switches to checkout form - PASS
Checkout form has all fields (advertiser, contact, email, phone, campaign) - PASS
Checkout form shows order summary and total - PASS
'Back to pricing' button exists - PASS
Pay button shows correct amount - PASS
Payment success page at /payment-success exists - PASS
Payment success page handles missing session_id with 'Invalid Session' message - PASS
'Back to Advertise' button on error state - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: CityBackground.js properly implements deterministic city selection based on pathname hash
Homepage always shows index 0 (Statue of Liberty) as expected
City backgrounds fade in smoothly with 1-second transition
City label displays correctly in bottom-right corner with landmark, city, country
AdvertisePage.js has complete rate card table with all 9 price combinations
Price calculation correctly applies placement multipliers (1x, 1.25x, 1.5x)
Checkout form validates required fields before submission
Payment status polling implemented with 6 attempts at 2-second intervals
Backend payments.py correctly calculates prices server-side (not trusting client)
Stripe checkout session created with proper metadata for tracking
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Test checkout sessions created via POST /api/payments/checkout during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified working: 1) City Background System - Homepage shows Statue of Liberty, other pages get deterministic-random cities from 30 available (About shows Havana, Advertise shows Seattle), city label visible in bottom-right corner, 2) Stripe Payment Integration - Rate card shows 9 prices ($100-$1920), 3 placement multipliers (1x, 1.25x, 1.5x), checkout creates real Stripe sessions, price calculation works correctly, 3) Payment Success Page - Handles missing session_id with 'Invalid Session' message, has polling for payment status. Previous features (featured carousel, sponsored posts, @mentions, pastel gradients) still working. Homepage stats: 30 Posts, 28 Contributors, 16 Countries.

city_background_system.homepage_city: Statue of Liberty — New York City, USA (index 0)

advertise_page.audience_stats: 30 Published Posts, 28 Contributors, 5 Continents, 8 Discussions, 14 Newsletter Subs
advertise_page.selectors: Ad Size (Small/Medium/Large), Frequency (1/4/8 Runs), Placement (Standard/Premium/Top Tier)
advertise_page.checkout_form: Company/Brand, Contact Name, Email, Phone, Campaign Name

payment_success_page.missing_session_handling: Shows 'Invalid Session' with 'Back to Advertise' button
payment_success_page.success_state: Shows booking ID and amount paid
payment_success_page.error_state: Shows error message with retry option

navbar_footer_links.footer: 'Advertise With Us' in Quick Links section
